title: Define Atlas adapter types for surface, scenario, path, and capture target
description: Replace Sentinel's flat screen assumptions with an explicit adapter boundary that understands Atlas surfaces, scenarios, hierarchical paths, and per-target capture metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: Sentinel has an explicit Atlas adapter model for surfaces, scenarios, paths, and targets
The adapter boundary states clearly what Sentinel consumes versus what Atlas owns
Flat legacy catalog entries can be mapped through the same model without losing migration clarity
Type definitions and docs no longer imply that a flat screen slug is the only review unit
proofRequirements: types and fixtures exist for Atlas-like input
adapter docs or examples show the mapping
nonGoals: shipping the full capture runner in this task

notes.text: Added Atlas-era adapter types for surfaces, scenarios, paths, targets, and entry strategies, plus a legacy catalog adapter that maps flat screen definitions onto the richer model. Documented the migration boundary in the README and added adapter tests.
